FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7faa85f732e0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-10T00:50:46Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-10T00:49:04Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-10T00:50:46Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-10T00:49:04Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/10 00:52:26.948171983 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948179407 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948222087 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948223430 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948239109 {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948239780 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948247765 new <- list()
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948248206 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948256251 new$width <- width
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948256681 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948264987 new$height <- height
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948265398 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948273733 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948274164 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948282400 new$title <- title
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948284924 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948293129 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948294231 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948312175 new$version <- version
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948313007 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948330419 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948331571 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948345758 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948346559 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948358622 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948359093 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948367168 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948367579 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948375594 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948376034 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948384821 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948385232 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948401101 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948401552 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948410368 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948410789 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948419656 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948420117 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948428953 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948429384 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948448850 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948450073 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948466767 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948479127 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948480038 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948493684 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948494145 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948505115 "default"))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948505576 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948513541 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948513962 }
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948521736 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948522217 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948532015 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948532486 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948543828 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948544338 }
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948552674 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948553095 }
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948560980 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948561410 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948570347 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948570788 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948588812 domain = NA)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948589733 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948605573 }
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948606464 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948621332 old$family <- family
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948622043 }
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948629998 version <- old$version
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948630479 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948639326 "2.0")
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948639897 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948647822 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948648262 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948660515 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948660946 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948669532 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948670013 domain = NA)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948679551 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948679982 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948690922 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948691343 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948706140 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948707323 invisible()
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948722742 }

2026/05/10 00:52:26.948171983 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948179407 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948222087 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948223430 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948239109 {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948239780 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948247765 new <- list()
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948248206 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948256251 new$width <- width
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948256681 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948264987 new$height <- height
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948265398 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948273733 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948274164 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948282400 new$title <- title
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948284924 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948293129 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948294231 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948312175 new$version <- version
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948313007 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948330419 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948331571 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948345758 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948346559 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948358622 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948359093 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948367168 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948367579 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948375594 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948376034 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948384821 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948385232 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948401101 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948401552 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948410368 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948410789 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948419656 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948420117 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948428953 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948429384 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948448850 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948450073 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948466767 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948479127 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948480038 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948493684 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948494145 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948505115 "default"))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948505576 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948513541 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948513962 }
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948521736 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948522217 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948532015 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948532486 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948543828 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948544338 }
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948552674 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948553095 }
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948560980 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948561410 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948570347 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948570788 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948588812 domain = NA)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948589733 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948605573 }
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948606464 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948621332 old$family <- family
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948622043 }
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948629998 version <- old$version
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948630479 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948639326 "2.0")
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948639897 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948647822 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948648262 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948660515 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948660946 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948669532 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948670013 domain = NA)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948679551 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948679982 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948690922 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948691343 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948706140 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948707323 invisible()
2026/05/10 00:52:26.948722742 }
